description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in a smooth, light beige material. The sofa features three large, rectangular back cushions and a single extended chaise section on the right side, providing ample lounging space. The armrests are broad, straight, and padded, matching the height of the backrest for a boxy, contemporary silhouette. The seat cushions are flat and uniform, with no visible tufting or decorative stitching, contributing to a minimalist aesthetic. The sofa sits on small, barely visible legs, giving it a low-profile appearance. Its clean lines and neutral color make it suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern L-shaped beige sectional sofa with broad armrests, three back cushions, and a right-side chaise. The design is minimalist with smooth upholstery and a low-profile base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three back cushions, broad armrests, and the chaise extending to the right.
description_view_1: Side view from the chaise end, highlighting the length of the chaise, the thickness of the armrest, and the profile of the back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the uniform height of the back cushions and armrests.
description_view_3: Side view from the main seat end, showing the armrest, the depth of the seat, and the alignment of the back cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose back cushions and two seat cushions, with a single extended chaise cushion; all cushions are uniform in size and shape, arranged in a sectional layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, straight, and padded armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, with a boxy, minimalist profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Small, block-style legs positioned at the corners and slightly recessed, minimally visible, likely made of dark-colored material.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with three segmented, loose cushions; no tufting or decorative features, providing a clean, continuous line.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
